description: Agentic SSD Pipeline for Viral Shorts: Search -> Script -> Design -> Generate

ssd_phases.name: SEARCH
ssd_phases.description: Discovery and transcript extraction from source content.
ssd_phases.gate: Verify transcript accuracy and source relevance

ssd_phases.name: SCRIPT
ssd_phases.description: Conversion of research into a viral narrative script.

ssd_phases.name: DESIGN
ssd_phases.description: Visual mapping of the script to scenes and asset requirements.
ssd_phases.gate: Verify visual consistency and asset availability

ssd_phases.name: GENERATE
ssd_phases.description: Production of VO, AI video clips, and Remotion composition.
ssd_phases.gate: Final quality check of rendered output

ssd_phases.name: CRITIQUE
ssd_phases.description: Automated and AI-driven QA of the final render.
